description_long: This is a small, weathered cabin with a gable roof covered in corrugated, aged metal sheets, showing signs of rust and wear. The exterior walls are constructed from greenish, moss-stained bricks, giving the structure a neglected and abandoned appearance. One side of the cabin features a large, irregularly shaped opening where the wall has collapsed, exposing the interior. There is a single rectangular window on one wall, and a simple cylindrical chimney protrudes from the roof. The roof overhangs slightly on all sides, and the overall structure appears dilapidated, with warped and broken sections. The cabin's surfaces are rough and uneven, contributing to its rustic and derelict character.
description: A small, dilapidated brick cabin with a rusted corrugated metal gable roof, a chimney, and a large collapsed section exposing the interior.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from above, showing the full expanse of the weathered corrugated metal roof and a single window on the mossy brick wall.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the gable roof, the chimney, and the large, jagged opening in the wall, revealing the damaged structure.
description_view_2: From above and the opposite side, the collapsed wall and roof damage are clearly visible, along with the window and chimney.
description_view_3: The rear of the cabin is shown, featuring an unbroken expanse of mossy brick wall and the full length of the gable roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal sheets and a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: one medium-sized rectangular window centered on one wall, asymmetrical distribution
attribute_door_placement: no intact exterior doors visible; large collapsed opening on one side serves as entry
